title: Featured collection exposes private/direct pinned posts as public
description: In activitypub.rs featured() (line 611), the query for the featured collection does not filter by post visibility. If a user pins a private or direct post, it appears in the /users/{username}/collections/featured AP endpoint. The rendered Note objects hardcode 'to: [as:Public]' (line 631), which means a private/direct post is served with Public addressing to any remote server that fetches the featured collection. The query should add 'AND p.visibility = "public"' to match the outbox query's pattern, or at minimum exclude direct and private posts.
